content.en:
"Five ultimate dimensional killing moves, create a few more ultimate dimensional killing moves, my strength can continue to improve a lot, and then improve the supreme dimensional rules a little, and then my strength will definitely not be inferior to the ancient ape star monarch and other powerhouses!"

Then, Ye Tian left Guangyuan's side and came to another place.

Abyssal Star Fragments.

This was once a fragment of an Ultimate Celestial Object, which was said to have been shattered by a battle between two Ultimate Realm Masters.

Now, this Abyssal Star fragment has turned into a special place, but it still contains the power of the Abyssal Star.

Therefore, Ye Tian came here, comprehended the Yuan Xing, and used the power of the Yuan Star to create an ultimate dimensional killing move.

"What a horrible pressure!"

Ye Tian hadn't approached the Yuanxing yet, and this dimension was much more terrifying than the power of those multidimensional stars in the multidimensional territory.

Even the most terrifying multidimensional star in the Multidimensional Territory was less than one percent of the Abyssal Star Fragment.

That is, Ye Tian's strength far surpassed that of ordinary Nine Realm peak powerhouses, otherwise he would not dare to approach the Yuanxing Fragment.

Wow!

Ye Tian stood on top of the fragments of the Abyssal Star, feeling the power of the Abyssal Star.

He also found that many Nine Realm Peaks were also here, 883 but they were a little far away from each other, and he could only vaguely perceive the aura of other Nine Realm Peaks.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian studied the power of Yuanxing here.

Soon, he found that the power of Yuanxing seemed to be very suitable for strengthening the physical body, somewhat similar to the power of the Divine Dimension, but it was more domineering than the power of the Divine Dimension.

In order to be able to study the power of the Abyss Star faster, Ye Tian even let a replica body do experiments, so that these replica bodies finally collapsed in the continuous research, but he also studied a lot of things.

Time flies.

After thousands of domain yuan years, Ye Tian had a sufficient understanding of the power of the Yuan Star, and only then did he begin to create his own Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move.

Ye Tian was going to use the physical killing moves to conduct research, so that once he created it, his body would become very tough and strong, far surpassing the previous one, and the increase in his combat power was the largest.

To this end, he worked hard to create in this area.

Of course.

He was also well aware that there would be many failures in the process of creation, but some sacrifices were necessary in order to create such a powerful killing move.

Therefore, he used himself to perform one (aeai) attempt again and again to create the ultimate dimensional killing move.

Fail!

Fail!

Or a failure!

But Ye Tian continued to create, and after many failures, he finally had hope.

In addition, he also created the cultivation path of the Yuanxing System from beginning to end, which seemed to be even stronger than the Divine Dimensional Body.

And because it is based on the abyssal star system created by himself, this system is very suitable for human beings, once the human race takes the abyssal star system, as long as it goes to the extreme, it is definitely comparable to the existence of the peak of the nine realms.

He knew very well that the cultivation path of the multidimensional realm was very difficult, and it was difficult to give birth to the existence of the Nine Realms, but if he cultivated the Yuanxing system at the same time, it would be equivalent to one more path.

"Continue to improve the Yuanxing system, and then teach it to the Terrans!"

Ye Tian decided.

And just like that, another long time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created a complete ultimate dimensional killing move-Abyssal Body!

Once this abyssal body is cast, Ye Tian's body will be extremely terrifying, far beyond the present, and after creating the abyssal body, his body will begin to transform, absorbing a large amount of abyssal star power to continuously improve his body.

It was a long time before his metamorphosis ended.

"Next, they should teach the Terran Yuanxing System, but if they want to cultivate the Yuanxing System, they must absorb the power of the Yuanxing. "

This Abyssal Star Fragment was too big for him to move, but there were actually some small fragments around this fragment, and if he brought it back, it would be enough for some humans to cultivate to the Nine Realms.

Soon.

Ye Tian took a fancy to a fragment of Xiaoyuan Star.

"Abyssal Body!"

"Give it to me!"

Ye Tian urged the killing move of the Abyss Body, and then grabbed the fragment of the Abyss Star with all his strength, shook it, and then slowly brought it back to the multidimensional territory.

Along.

Who would dare to stop it?

After a while.

Ye Tian dragged this fragment of the Xiaoyuan Star and finally rushed back to the side of the multidimensional territory.

And then.

He dragged this piece of Xiaoyuan Star Fragment into the eighteenth dimension, and a piece of Xiaoyuan Star Fragment entered the eighteenth dimension, which naturally attracted the attention of the nine ultimate forces.

But after they found out that it was Ye Tian, they naturally didn't stop it.

It was just a fragment of the small abyss star, not a large fragment, and it couldn't have much impact on the multidimensional territory.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian placed this small abyss star fragment in the fourteenth dimension, and then created a Terran cultivation area with the abyssal star fragment as the core in the fourteenth dimension.

At that time, he will let all the extradimensional realms of the human race enter here to cultivate the Yuanxing system.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also placed the temple headquarters of the human race on this abyssal star fragment, and then began to transform the abyssal star fragment, radiating the energy of the fragment to form layers of areas, different cultivators enter different areas, only the powerhouses of the nine realms can enter the fragment to cultivate, and the eight realms cannot be approached, otherwise they will be crushed by the power of the abyssal star.

this day.

Ye Tian took Ye Xingchen to the abyssal star fragment.

"Father, what is this place?"

When Ye Xingchen came to the Yuanxing fragment, it was simply difficult to move, and the suppression here was too terrifying.

"This is a fragment of the Abyssal Star that my father brought back from the Sea of Dimensions, and cultivating the Abyssal Star System here will be very beneficial to you. "

Ye Tian said.

"Yuanxing system, what is this?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Immediately, Ye Tian told the Yuanxing system, and after Ye Xingchen heard it, he was very excited.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian taught the complete Yuanxing system to Ye Xingchen.

After Ye Xingchen obtained the inheritance of the Yuanxing system, he began to cultivate the way of the Yuanxing, absorbing the power of the Yuanxing to refine his body.

Of course.

Humans don't have the corresponding talent yet, and it will definitely be slow to follow the path of the Abyssal Star.

However, these human extradimensional realms are concurrent cultivation, and the cultivation speed will not be too slow.

Ye Tian also divided the Dao of the Yuanxing into eighteen-dimensional realms, and after the eighteen-dimensional realms was the ultimate realm.

The ultimate body is already equivalent to the Nine Realms, if you complete the Ultimate Realm and break through to the ultimate master, it is equivalent to the peak existence of the Nine Realms that has mastered the ultimate dimension killing moves.
